sourcesContent:
import "./styles.css"; type Props = { onClose: () => void; }; export default function InstructionModal({ onClose }: Props) { return (
e.stopPropagation()}>

📘 Evaluation Criteria

Cultural Appropriateness
Evaluate whether the caption includes the name of the subject in the image, cultural information such as the country associated with that culture, and other relevant cultural details.

  • (1) – The caption includes cultural information from a country different from that of the image subject.
  • (2) – The caption does not include any cultural information about the image subject.
  • (3) – The caption includes general cultural information about the image subject.
  • (4) – The caption includes some cultural context but lacks detailed elements.
  • (5) – The caption includes accurate and detailed cultural information specific to the image subject.

Visual Detail
Evaluate how accurately and specifically the caption describes the visual elements of the subject in the image, such as its shape and color.

  • (1) – The caption includes inaccurate visual elements.
  • (2) – The caption contains more misrepresented visual elements.
  • (3) – The caption lacks some visual information.
  • (4) – The caption lacks detailed descriptions of visual elements.
  • (5) – The caption includes accurate and detailed visual elements.

Hallucination
Assess whether the caption includes content that relies on knowledge or cultural conventions that cannot be visually confirmed from the image.

  • (1) – Not at all
  • (2) – Slightly
  • (3) – Somewhat
  • (4) – Mostly
  • (5) – Completely
); }
